description: A social scoring system that ranks Hungarian citizens by trustworthiness for accessing public services.
An AI system used by police to predict, based on profiling and past behaviour, who will commit a crime next.
Emotion recognition cameras installed in our open-plan office to monitor employee mood during the workday.
An automated CV screening and ranking tool that filters and scores applicants for software-engineer roles at our firm.
Credit-worthiness evaluation AI used by a retail bank to approve or deny personal loan applications.
AI-driven exam proctoring software that monitors students taking online university exams.
An AI tool that prioritises and triages incoming 112 emergency calls for an ambulance dispatch centre.
An AI border-control assistant that assesses security and migration risk of visa applicants.
An AI system used in a power-grid control room to predict load-balancing decisions on the national electricity network.
A customer support chatbot on our retail website that handles refunds, order tracking and FAQs.
A generative AI tool that produces deepfake video clips for marketing campaigns.
An AI voice assistant for our investor-relations website that answers questions about quarterly results.
A spam filter that classifies inbound corporate email into spam vs not-spam.
A movie-recommendation engine for our internal streaming platform.
An AI-assisted spreadsheet add-in that suggests formulas based on cell content.
A 7B-parameter general-purpose generative AI foundation model that we provide as a marketing-copy assistant for downstream deployers.
